stimulus: During the Great Depression, Dorothea Lange traveled the dust-stricken farmlands of California as a documentary photographer for the Farm Security Administration. Recording the dignity and hardships of migrant agricultural workers ______blank of central importance to Lange, who later helped found a major center for the study of photography in Oakland.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "was" agrees in number with the singular subject "recording." Gerunds such as "recording" are always singular.

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "are" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "recording." Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "were" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "recording." Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "have been" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "recording."
